query:
SELECT u.open_id, u.name, u.email, u.login_method, dp.driver_code, dp.name as profile_name
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN driver_profiles dp ON dp.userId = u.id
WHERE u.login_method = 'demo' OR u.email LIKE '%demo%'
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
